hero.title: Quantum AI
hero.description1: Quantum AI, established in 2022, has been a pioneer in quantum computing, significantly influencing the trading sector. Experience how quantum innovation and AI can revolutionise your market tactics.
hero.description2: Quantum AI unites advanced quantum-inspired algorithms with modern artificial intelligence to help you analyse complex market conditions with greater clarity, speed, and confidence.
hero.description3: Our technology is developed by Quantum AI Ltd — a UK-based research and software organisation focused on bringing next-generation computational methods to financial analysis.
hero.description4: Create your account using the form beside this text and gain access to the platform, intelligent analysis tools, and a secure environment designed to support informed trading decisions.
hero.disclaimer: All trading carries risk. No profits are guaranteed.

form.title: Start Trading With Ai
form.subtitle: Start your AI-powered trading journey
form.termsError: Please accept the Terms & Conditions to continue.

features.title: Why Choose Quantum AI
features.subtitle: Experience the future of trading with our cutting-edge quantum computing technology

userFriendly.title: User-friendly Interface
userFriendly.description: Our trading interface is so easy even a child can use it. A member of the platform will call you and guide you through the entire process to ensure maximum returns.

automated.title: Automated Trading
automated.description: Our automated trading bots can do all the work for you. No need to be an expert at trading. Earn while you sleep.

trusted.title: Trusted Trading Platforms
trusted.description: Quantum AI is based in the UK, and we only work and partner with UK companies. Stringent and well-known platforms will be encouraged.

quantum.title: Quantum Volume (QV) Score
quantum.description: Our quantum computing system has achieved a quantum volume (QV) 14,802. Achieving a high score on the industry-recognised QV benchmark, developed by IBM to test quantum computers' capability.

deposit.title: Minimum $250 Deposit
deposit.description: Try with a small deposit of $250. We allow small risk demos so you can test our trading bot on the market before larger deposits.

security.title: Uncompromised Security
security.description: Your data is safe with us. Trust us; we keep our quantum computing secret; emails are safe.

howItWorks.title: Start Trading in Minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Our streamlined onboarding process gets you in the market faster.

step1.title: Connect Account
step1.description: Securely link your favorite exchange via encrypted API keys.

step2.title: Pick a Strategy
step2.description: Choose from pre-set AI models or build your own custom bot.

step3.title: Launch Bot
step3.description: Activate your AI and watch it execute trades with surgical precision.

profitTracking.title: Live Profit Tracking
profitTracking.description: Monitor your realized and unrealized PNL in real-time across all your connected accounts.

riskManagement.title: Risk Management Controls
riskManagement.description: Advanced stop-loss, take-profit, and trailing-drawdown settings to protect your capital.

tradeLogs.title: Comprehensive Trade Logs
tradeLogs.description: Audit every single move the AI makes with detailed reasoning for each execution.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is my capital safe with Quantum AI?
faq.a1: Yes. We never have direct access to your funds. The platform connects to your exchange via API keys with restricted withdrawal permissions. Your assets stay in your own exchange wallet.
faq.q2: What is the minimum investment required?
faq.a2: There is no minimum to use the platform itself, but most exchanges require at least $50-$100 to begin executing trades effectively.
faq.q3: Do I need prior trading experience?
faq.a3: Not at all. While experienced traders can use our advanced tools, beginners can start with our 'AI-Smart' pre-configured bots that require zero technical knowledge.
faq.a4: We currently support Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, OKX, and Bybit. More exchanges are being added monthly.

cta.title: Start your AI trading journey today
cta.description: Join thousands of smart investors who have automated their financial future with Quantum AI.

footer.description: Revolutionizing global trading through advanced artificial intelligence and low-latency infrastructure.
footer.disclaimer: Legal Disclaimer: Trading financial instruments involves significant risk and can result in the loss of invested capital. Quantum AI provides analytical tools and does not guarantee profits. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Quantum AI Technologies. All rights reserved.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Quantum AI Trading Platform, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

aiServices.title: AI Trading Services
aiServices.content: Our platform provides AI-powered trading tools and analytics. Important points to understand:
points: The AI predictions are for informational purposes only
Past performance does not guarantee future results
You are solely responsible for your trading decisions
We do not guarantee profits or protect against losses

riskDisclosure.title: Risk Disclosure
riskDisclosure.content: Trading cryptocurrencies and other financial instruments carries significant risk. You may lose some or all of your invested capital.
riskDisclosure.advice: You should carefully consider whether trading is suitable for you in light of your financial circumstances.

dataPrivacy.title: Data Privacy
dataPrivacy.content: We take your privacy seriously. Your personal information is encrypted and never shared with third parties without your consent. Read our full Privacy Policy for more details.

apiUsage.title: API Usage
points: We only require read and trade permissions
You can revoke access at any time
